stories.name: All Sizes
All Variants
Disabled
stories.snippet: const Disabled = () => <Button variant="disabled" size="default" disabled fullWidth={false}>Disabled</Button>;

stories.name: Loading
stories.snippet: const Loading = () => <Button variant="loading" size="default" loading fullWidth={false}>Loading</Button>;

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = () => <Input
    variant="default"
    value=""
    placeholder="이메일을 입력하세요"
    disabled={false}
    errorMessage="올바른 값을 입력해주세요."
    warningMessage="입력값을 다시 확인해주세요." />;

stories.name: With Label
stories.snippet:
const WithLabel = () => <Input
    variant="default"
    id="email"
    type="email"
    label="이메일"
    labelRequired
    placeholder="hello@example.com"
    value="" />;

stories.name: With Input
Required
Basic Dropdown
With Right Icons
stories.snippet:
const WithRightIcons = () => (
  <Menu.Dropdown header={<Menu.Header>편집</Menu.Header>}>
    <Menu.DropdownItem right={<Menu.DropdownIcon name="icon-setting-mono" />}>
      첫 번째 메뉴
    </Menu.DropdownItem>
    <Menu.DropdownItem right={<Menu.DropdownIcon name="icon-setting-mono" />}>
      두 번째 메뉴
    </Menu.DropdownItem>
    <Menu.DropdownItem right={<Menu.DropdownIcon name="icon-setting-mono" />}>
      세 번째 메뉴
    </Menu.DropdownItem>
  </Menu.Dropdown>
);

stories.name: Disabled Option
Default
With Groups
stories.snippet:
const WithGroups = () => (
  <Select>
    <option value="">카테고리 선택</option>
    <optgroup label="프론트엔드">
      <option value="react">React</option>
      <option value="vue">Vue</option>
    </optgroup>
    <optgroup label="백엔드">
      <option value="node">Node.js</option>
      <option value="python">Python</option>
    </optgroup>
  </Select>
);

stories.name: With Label
stories.snippet:
const WithLabel = () => <Select disabled={false} labelRequired id="job" label="직업">
    <option value="">직업을 선택하세요</option>
    <option value="developer">개발자</option>
    <option value="designer">디자이너</option>
    <option value="planner">기획자</option>
</Select>;
